full_text:
Hu Zhong
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hu Zhong. Arranged the death of old enemy Wang Hong. Later attacked in dream by Wang Hong and became deathly ill. Hu Zhong was affiliated with Li Jue. Hu Zhong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
